com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl
Class WatcherFieldType

java.lang.Object
  com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.AbstractCustomFieldType
      com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.AbstractSingleFieldType
          com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.StringCFType
              com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.TextCFType
                  com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.AbstractMultiCFType
                      com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.MultiUserCFType
                          com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.CustomFieldType, com.atlassian.jira.imports.project.customfield.ProjectImportableCustomField, com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.SortableCustomField, com.atlassian.jira.notification.type.UserCFNotificationTypeAware
public class WatcherFieldType
extends com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.MultiUserCFType

This class is a custom field type that allows users with "Manage Watcher List" permissions to modify users when creating/updating issues.

Author:
Ray Barham
See Also:
MultiUserCFType

WatcherFieldType

Method Detail

addWatchers

protected void addWatchers(com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue,
                           java.util.List userList)
Add a list of users as watchers on an issue.

Parameters:
issue - The issue to add watchers to.
userList - A list of User objects to add as watchers.

createValue

public void createValue(com.atlassian.jira.issue.fields.CustomField customField,
                        com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue,
                        java.lang.Object value)
Overriden, see AbstractMultiCFType.createValue. Adds a list of watchers to an issue.

Parameters:
customField - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
issue - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
value - List of User objects to add as watchers.

isIssueEditable

protected boolean isIssueEditable(com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue)
Checks to see if the issue can be edited. It checks to see if the issue has been create, if it is editable, and if the authenticated user has permissions.

Parameters:
issue - The issue being edited.
Returns:
True if able to edit, false otherwise.

isUserPermitted

public boolean isUserPermitted(com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue)
Checks if a user the authenticated user has the "Manage Watcher List" permission.

Parameters:
issue - The issue the user is trying to add watchers to.
Returns:
True if has permissions, false otherwise.

getValueFromIssue

public java.lang.Object getValueFromIssue(com.atlassian.jira.issue.fields.CustomField field,
                                          com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue)
Overriden, see AbstractMultiCFType.getValueFromIssue. Returns the a list of watchers on the passed issue

Returns:
List of User objects that are watchers on the passed issue.

getVelocityParameters

public java.util.Map getVelocityParameters(com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue,
                                           com.atlassian.jira.issue.fields.CustomField field,
                                           com.atlassian.jira.issue.fields.layout.field.FieldLayoutItem fieldLayoutItem)
Overriden, see AbstractCustomFieldType.getVelocityParameters. Adds the "hasPermissions" parameter to velocity with true if the authenticated user has "Manage Watcher List" permissions, false otherwise.

getWatchers

protected java.util.List getWatchers(com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue)
Get a list of of watchers on an issue.

Parameters:
issue - The issue to get watchers from.
Returns:
A List of User objects that are watchers on the passed issue.

removeWatchers

protected void removeWatchers(com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue,
                              java.util.List userList)
Remove a list of users as watchers on an issue.

Parameters:
issue - The issue to add watchers to.
userList - A list of User objects to remove from being watchers.

updateValue

public void updateValue(com.atlassian.jira.issue.fields.CustomField customField,
                        com.atlassian.jira.issue.Issue issue,
                        java.lang.Object value)
Overrides AbstractMultiCFType.updateValue. Updates an issue with a list of watchers.

Parameters:
customField - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
issue - See AbstractMultiCFType.createValue.
value - List of User objects to update as watchers. Note, any user not in this list that was previously a watcher will be removed.
